---
title: "R CMD CHECKS"
output: 
  rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{R CMD CHECKS}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---


# R CMD Check Workflow

This GitHub Actions workflow performs R CMD checks on the latest released R
version and on different operating systems (linux, macos, and windows).

## Workflow Structure

The workflow consists of a single job: `R-CMD-check`.

### `R-CMD-check` Job

This job runs R CMD checks on different operating systems. The checks are
performed in parallel for each operating system.


#### Inputs

- `error-on`: Input for the 'error_on' parameter in `rcmdcheck::rcmdcheck()`. Defaults to `'note'`.

#### Steps

1. Set up R environment using the [`setup_R` action](setup_r.html)
2. Run R CMD check using the [`check-r-package` action](https://github.com/r-lib/actions/tree/v2/check-r-package)

### Concurrency

Concurrency settings are specified to manage concurrent workflow runs effectively.
